text: The world tilts with angular glass and bright, clinical interiors. My first impression is one of detachment, as if I’m crossing a threshold into a space dedicated to sterile reasoning or innovation. My presence here, among bold "R+D" letters and walls adorned with digital knowledge, makes me ponder the intersection of human creativity and technology. The urge to recall a specific consumer review seems futile in this contemplative atmosphere—here, I am reminded more of the ongoing quest for understanding than of grievances or commerce. I feel curious, distant, yet oddly inspired by the potential within these walls.
